entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `source` TEXT NOT NULL, `externalId` TEXT NOT NULL, `title` TEXT NOT NULL, `titleNormalized` TEXT NOT NULL, `priceEuro` INTEGER NOT NULL, `district` TEXT NOT NULL, `districtNormalized` TEXT NOT NULL, `location` TEXT NOT NULL, `rooms` REAL NOT NULL, `areaSqm` REAL NOT NULL, `imageUrl` TEXT, `listingUrl` TEXT NOT NULL, `isJobcenterSuitable` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isWohngeldEligible` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isWbsRequired` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isFavorite` INTEGER NOT NULL, `fingerprint` TEXT NOT NULL, `updatedAtEpochMillis` INTEGER NOT NULL)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`key` TEXT NOT NULL, `lastSuccessfulSyncMillis` INTEGER, `lastAttemptMillis` INTEGER, `lastErrorMessage` TEXT, `isSyncing` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`key`))

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
INSERT OR REPLACE INTO room_master_table (id,identity_hash) VALUES(42, '7d4c5e4bbf737264d9941af7d13c0f8f')
